Learning Center — Advanced GEO · AEO · AIO Curriculum

Structured educational content on the mathematical, architectural, and protocol-level foundations of AI-mediated discovery optimization.

The Curriculum

The transition from search engines to generative engines represents a fundamental shift in how information is discovered, consumed, and acted upon. Our curriculum provides structured educational content organized into four learning paths.

Core Curriculum

🌐

Generative Engine Optimization — Technical Primer

Mathematical foundations of optimizing content for transformer-based RAG pipelines. Covers entity density optimization, citation graph topology, semantic manifold density, and the formal GEO Score metric.

Read →
🤖

AI Engine Optimization — Protocol Architecture

The five-layer agentic commerce protocol stack: capability discovery, verifiable credential authentication, tool-augmented generation, function execution, and agent-to-agent negotiation.

Read →
🧠

AI Infrastructure Optimization Framework

Composable data plane architecture encompassing warehouse-native CDPs, graph-native metadata catalogs, Open Policy Agent governance, and inference-aware FinOps frameworks.

Read →
🗄️

Five-Layer Martech Reference Architecture

Production-grade reference architecture spanning infrastructure, data plane, intelligence, capability services, and application layers — governed by OPA-based policy enforcement and inference-aware FinOps allocation.

Read →

Learning Paths

🔵 GEO Practitioner Path

Mathematical and architectural foundations of generative engine optimization.

Topics: Entity density optimization · Citation graph topology · RAG pipeline mechanics · Dense passage retrieval alignment · Semantic manifold density · Formal GEO Score

🟣 AEO Architect Path

Protocol-level understanding of autonomous agent commerce infrastructure.

Topics: Capability discovery protocol · W3C Verifiable Credentials · Tool-augmented generation schemas · Agent-to-agent negotiation · DPoP authentication · Function Calling alignment

🟢 AIO Strategist Path

Enterprise-scale infrastructure optimization for AI-mediated marketing operations.

Topics: Warehouse-native CDP · Open Policy Agent governance · Graph-native metadata management · FinOps for inference cost · Composable data plane architecture · Compliance as Code

This is an active research curriculum. Content is continuously refined as the underlying technologies and protocols evolve. Last updated: June 2026.

Research Collaboration →

GEO · AEO · AIO — Engineering the Future of AI-Discoverable Content

[THIS SITE IS UNDER ACTIVE CONSTRUCTION — FRAMEWORKS, BENCHMARKS, AND ARCHITECTURES ARE BEING CONTINUOUSLY REFINED.] GEONEXUS is a next-generation agency and education platform specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI Engine Optimization (AEO), and Artificial Intelligence Optimization (AIO). We help enterprises architect, optimize, and future-proof their digital presence for the age of AI-driven discovery.
